note: As-is baseline (0.21.0) — the color flow the change touches. Source.Color exists but is OFTEN BLANK (no auto-assignment); model.sourceColorMap maps a source ONLY when s.Color != '' so a colorless source renders a dimStyle grey dot (or is omitted). There is NO project-level color. Filter chips carry no dot; the changelog row's leading ● means a live SESSION, not a source; config source rows start with an uncolored ● and project rows have no dot. Separately, runBoard/chooseBoard has NO data-home guard, so `gogo` in ~ (where FindRoot walks up to ~/.gogo, the data home) opens an EMPTY single-repo board. flow.mmd = this baseline.

diagrams.title: Before: Source.Color often blank -> grey dot; no Project color; no chip/changelog source dots; no data-home guard (gogo in ~ = empty board)
